name: Population-Based Particle Classification
description: You are a microbiologist analyzing a culture containing two bacterial strains of different sizes. Using the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image, segment the particles and classify them into two distinct populations based on area. Filter out noise smaller than 60 pixels. Classify the remaining particles into 'Small Population' (area between 60 and 350 pixels inclusive) and 'Large Population' (area greater than 350 pixels). Save the statistical measurements including the 'Area' column for each group to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/small_particles.csv and ~/ImageJ_Data/results/large_particles.csv. Create a classification map image where 'Small' particles are colored BLUE and 'Large' particles are colored GREEN, and save it to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/classification_map.png.
